contrarian_outcomes.name: Ronald Acuna Jr.

pa_detail.result: Single (sharp ground ball to LF, runner to 2B) — started ATL's 3-run rally
Pop Out to C in foul

contrarian_outcomes.verdict_one_liner: Acuna reached base twice (1H, 1BB) in 5 PA with a run scored — the single in inn 5 directly preceded the 3-run rally that decided the game. CausalWAR Buy-Low directionally vindicated.

contrarian_outcomes.name: Bryson Stott

fielding.note: Turned 3 assists at 2B, 0 errors. Cleanest infield night possible.

pa_detail.result: Double LD-CF (with PHI down 4-2 in last AB; trailing-runner stranded)

contrarian_outcomes.verdict_one_liner: Stott went 1-for-4 (a meaningless 9th-inning double down 4-2) with 0 BB and 3 clean assists — not a marquee 'Over-Valued' data point either way. CausalWAR's DEFENSE GAP magnitude (predicted -3.42) was always too sharp; tonight's outcome is consistent with the 2025-full-season finding that the magnitude was attenuated (actual delta -0.07). Direction weakly held: 0 BB, 1 lucky hit, no game impact.

contrarian_outcomes.name: Jonah Heim
contrarian_outcomes.verdict_one_liner: Heim did not start (Baldwin caught). No in-game test available. The 2025-full-season hit (delta -0.99) already validated the Over-Valued direction; one missed start neither moves nor refutes the call.

contrarian_outcomes.name: Martin Perez
contrarian_outcomes.starting_pitcher: Grant Holmes (ATL) started; ATL bullpen was Bummer/Kinley/Lee/Suarez/Iglesias
contrarian_outcomes.verdict_one_liner: Perez did not pitch (Holmes started; bullpen all RHP except Bummer & Lee neither of whom is Perez). No in-game test. Already a documented full-season MISS (actual +0.43 vs predicted -2.27); tonight is silent.

summary.marquee_moment: Acuna's 5th-inning single off Painter ignited the 3-run rally that flipped a 2-1 deficit into a 4-2 ATL lead — the textbook Buy-Low moment in a single PA.
